product_information.product_name: Dr. Organic Aloe Vera Shampoo 265 ML
product_information.description:
Het Product
This Aloe Vera Shampoo is a gentle everyday cleanser designed to care for both the hair and scalp. Ideal for those seeking a soothing, non-irritating wash, it helps maintain naturally healthy and balanced hair. Formulated with organic aloe vera and calming botanical extracts, it works to cleanse, hydrate and refresh without weighing the hair down. The gentle formula helps soften and condition while supporting the scalp’s natural moisture levels. With regular use, hair feels soothed, soft and beautifully restored with a fresh, healthy shine.
Ingredienten
Aqua, ALOE BARBADENSIS LEAF JUICE (KEY ACTIVE: Aloe Vera) powder†, Ammonium lauryl sulfate, Glycerin, Caprylyl/capryl glucoside, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Sea salt (Maris sal), Aesculus hippocastanum (Horse chestnut) seed extract†, Avena sativa (Oat) Kernel extract†, Calendula officinalis flower extract†, Chamomilla recutita (Matricaria) flower extract†, Guar hydroxypropyltrimonium chloride, Parfum, Citric acid, Sodium phytate, Sodium benzoate, Potassium sorbate, Limonene, Linalool, Citral, Pinene, Linalyl acetate. † certified organic 10% organic, 98% natural origin
